audit_items.proof_trace: The inner guard at L390 (`if (updatedAt < dataFeedUpdatedAt)`) is mathematically equivalent to the assertion condition `dataFeedUpdatedAt > streamsUpdatedAt`; the data feed price is only written at L391-400 when this guard passes. An additional outer guard at L385 also requires the streams price to be stale, making the implementation strictly more conservative than the property requires — the stale source can never override the fresh source.
